title: Simunye FC goes down fighting
description: SOCCER NEWS - In a thrilling Future Stars...
bodyText:
> Mkhanyisi Manciya scored twice and Zefania Mabunda added one for Fast Eleven, while Sindile Magubane netted Simunye’s lone goal.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
